---
date: 2026-03-08
---

# Daily notes — 2026-03-08

- Created MEMORY.md rules: keep only concise, high-value learnings.
- Memory files will be stored as QMD (this file).

# Session log (brief)
- User instructed to keep MEMORY.md minimal and use QMD for everything else.
- No prior MEMORY.md existed; created starter files.
- Key project links saved: https://github.com/Kryon-site/website, https://github.com/Kryon-site/CRM, https://www.notion.so/Kryon-31861f73917280ca9b2bd1a3d7eafcb4
